About Nova Kingdom Rentals

Nova Kingdom Rentals is a Bridgewater, Nova Scotia-based inflatable and party rental company providing bouncy castle rentals, inflatable rentals, water slides, interactive games, lawn games, a 360 Photo Booth, and party rental packages for birthdays, school events, community events, festivals, corporate events, fundraisers, and family celebrations.

Based in Bridgewater, serving the South Shore and Nova Scotia, with larger events and selected bookings available across the Maritimes / Atlantic Canada. Travel quoted separately.

Insurance
Fully insured
Setup
Setup and takedown included
Delivery
First 15 km free from Bridgewater, then $0.72/km.

Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Nova Kingdom Rentals will confirm availability, travel cost, setup suitability, staffing requirements, and deposit details before your reservation is finalized.

Check availability and request a quote
